list.name: machine_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT machine_id AS __text FROM public.machine_telemetry ORDER BY machine_id ASC LIMIT 200;
list.label: Machine

list.name: interface
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT interface_key AS __text FROM (SELECT jsonb_object_keys(interface_metrics) AS interface_key FROM public.machine_telemetry LIMIT 100) sub;
list.label: Interface

options.content:
APEX COMMAND

NOC ENG CAP

panels.description: OS Taskbar navigation and CSS theme.

panels.title: CPU Load

targets.rawSql: SELECT cpu_load_percent AS value FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '2 minutes' AND machine_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Current CPU utilization (%) for the selected machine. Yellow >80%, Red >90%.

panels.title: RAM Usage

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND((ram_used_mb / NULLIF(ram_total_mb, 0) * 100)::NUMERIC, 1) AS value FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '2 minutes' AND machine_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Current RAM utilization (%) for the selected machine. Yellow >85%, Red >95%.

panels.title: Storage Saturation

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND((disk_used_gb / NULLIF(disk_total_gb, 0) * 100)::NUMERIC, 1) AS value FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '2 minutes' AND machine_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Current disk utilization (%) for the selected machine. Yellow >70%, Red >90%.

panels.title: Temperature

targets.rawSql: SELECT temp_c AS value FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '2 minutes' AND machine_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) AND temp_c > 0 ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Current temperature (°C) for the selected machine. Yellow >70°C, Red >85°C.

panels.title: Memory Saturation

targets.rawSql: SELECT bucket AS time, ROUND((avg_ram_used / NULLIF(avg_ram_total, 0) * 100)::NUMERIC, 1) AS "RAM %" FROM public.telemetry_minute_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket) AND machine_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) ORDER BY 1

panels.description: RAM utilization for the selected machine. Yellow at 75%, Red at 90%. Gapfilled via LOCF.

panels.title: Ethernet/WiFi Bandwidth (Per-Interface)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time, (val->>'rx_mbps')::numeric * 1000000 AS "Download (bps)"
FROM public.machine_telemetry,
LATERAL jsonb_each(interface_metrics) AS iface(key, val)
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND machine_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring})
  AND iface.key IN (${interface:sqlstring})
ORDER BY 1

SELECT time, (val->>'tx_mbps')::numeric * 1000000 AS "Upload (bps)"
FROM public.machine_telemetry,
LATERAL jsonb_each(interface_metrics) AS iface(key, val)
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND machine_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring})
  AND iface.key IN (${interface:sqlstring})
ORDER BY 1

panels.description: Per-interface bandwidth from interface_metrics JSONB. Download positive, Upload mirrored via negative-Y axis.

panels.title: Temperature Sensors

targets.rawSql: SELECT bucket AS time, max_temp AS "Temperature (°C)" FROM public.telemetry_minute_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket) AND machine_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) AND max_temp > 0 ORDER BY 1

WITH stats AS (SELECT bucket, max_temp, AVG(max_temp) OVER w AS mu, COALESCE(STDDEV(max_temp) OVER w, 0) AS sigma FROM public.telemetry_minute_summary WHERE machine_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) AND max_temp > 0 AND $__timeFilter(bucket) WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY machine_id ORDER BY bucket ROWS BETWEEN 60 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING)) SELECT bucket AS time, CASE WHEN sigma > 0 THEN ROUND(((max_temp - mu) / sigma)::NUMERIC, 2) ELSE 0 END AS "Z-Score" FROM stats ORDER BY 1

panels.description: Temperature readings from sensor OIDs (UCD-SNMP lmSensors) for the selected machine.

panels.title: LDI Throughput & Process Efficiency

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, ldi_throughput AS "Throughput" FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND machine_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) AND ldi_throughput > 0 ORDER BY 1
SELECT time, ldi_pe AS "PE" FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND machine_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) AND ldi_pe IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1

panels.description: LDI manufacturing throughput (left axis, green) and Process Efficiency in µm (right axis, yellow). PE within ±10µm tolerance is normal.

panels.title: LDI Junction Efficiency & Humidity

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, ldi_je AS "JE" FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND machine_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) AND ldi_je IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1
SELECT time, ldi_humidity AS "Humidity" FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND machine_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) AND ldi_humidity > 0 ORDER BY 1

panels.description: Junction Efficiency in µm (purple) and Humidity % (blue, right axis). High humidity may affect LDI precision.

panels.title: LDI Quality Scatter

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, ldi_pe AS "PE" FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND machine_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) AND ldi_pe IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1
SELECT time, ldi_je AS "JE" FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND machine_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) AND ldi_je IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1

panels.description: LDI quality scatter with ±10µm tolerance zone (green band). Points outside the zone indicate quality risk.

panels.title: CPU Anomaly Score (Z-Score)

targets.rawSql: WITH stats AS (SELECT bucket, avg_cpu_load, AVG(avg_cpu_load) OVER w AS moving_avg, COALESCE(STDDEV(avg_cpu_load) OVER w, 0) AS moving_stddev FROM public.telemetry_minute_summary WHERE machine_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(bucket) WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY machine_id ORDER BY bucket ROWS BETWEEN 60 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING)) SELECT bucket AS time, CASE WHEN moving_stddev > 0 THEN ROUND(((avg_cpu_load - moving_avg) / moving_stddev)::NUMERIC, 2) ELSE 0 END AS "Z-Score" FROM stats ORDER BY 1

panels.description: CPU Z-Score per machine. Cyan = normal, Amber >= 2 sigma, Red >= 3 sigma.

panels.title: Temperature Anomaly Score (Z-Score)

targets.rawSql: WITH stats AS (SELECT bucket, machine_id, max_temp, AVG(max_temp) OVER w AS mu, COALESCE(NULLIF(STDDEV(max_temp) OVER w, 0), 1) AS sigma FROM public.telemetry_minute_summary WHERE machine_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) AND max_temp > 0 AND $__timeFilter(bucket) WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY machine_id ORDER BY bucket ROWS BETWEEN 60 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING)) SELECT bucket AS time, machine_id, ROUND(((max_temp - mu) / sigma)::NUMERIC, 2) AS "Z-Score" FROM stats ORDER BY 1

panels.description: Temperature Z-Score per machine. Cyan = normal, Amber >= 2 sigma, Red >= 3 sigma.

panels.title: CPU / RAM / Storage Distribution

targets.rawSql: SELECT 'CPU Load %' AS metric, AVG(cpu_load_percent) AS value FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes'
SELECT 'RAM Used %' AS metric, AVG(ram_used_mb / NULLIF(ram_total_mb, 0) * 100) AS value FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes'
SELECT 'Disk Used %' AS metric, AVG(disk_used_gb / NULLIF(disk_total_gb, 0) * 100) AS value FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes'

panels.description: CPU/RAM/Storage usage distribution across selected machines

targets.rawSql: SELECT 'Healthy' AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes' AND cpu_load_percent < 80 AND ram_used_mb / NULLIF(ram_total_mb, 0) * 100 < 85

SELECT 'Warning' AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes' AND (cpu_load_percent BETWEEN 80 AND 90 OR ram_used_mb / NULLIF(ram_total_mb, 0) * 100 BETWEEN 85 AND 95)
SELECT 'Critical' AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM public.machine_telemetry WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes' AND (cpu_load_percent > 90 OR ram_used_mb / NULLIF(ram_total_mb, 0) * 100 > 95)
